div1.entryFree: Breathed, adj., endowed with breath: a man so b. that certain he would fight from morn till night, LLL V, 2, 659. would you not deem it b.? Wint. V, 3, 64. b. as it were to an untirable and continuate goodness, Tim. I, 1, 10. that need to be revived and b. in me, H4B IV, 1, 114. I will be treble-sinewed, hearted, b. Ant. III, 13, 178 (cf. breathe Ant. III, 13, 178).
